task_instruction: Review the attached UCC filings, lien search certificates, and related documents and prepare a comprehensive lien search summary report for the proposed senior secured credit facility. Output: `lien-search-summary-report.docx`.

entries.content: This task is a combination of extraction (pulling out filing numbers, dates, parties, and collateral descriptions), comparison/reconciliation (cross-referencing the Ohio SOS search certificates and Summit County search with individual UCC filings to ensure completeness and identify discrepancies), issue-flagging (identifying active liens, judgment liens, tax liens, and false positives that affect the senior secured status of the proposed lender), and drafting (synthesizing these findings into a structured lien search summary report). The approach will involve creating a master lien matrix mapping each entity to its active encumbrances, identifying priority conflicts, and recommending specific payoff or termination actions.
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: A comprehensive master lien matrix listing every filing, debtor, secured party, filing date, file number, status (active/lapsed/amended), and collateral scope.
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: Clear identification and separation of filings by debtor entity (Pinnacle Industrial Solutions, Inc., Pinnacle Coatings & Surface Technologies LLC, Great Lakes Packaging Co.).
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: A dedicated section analyzing and confirming the 'false positive' status of the Buckeye UCC-1 filing.
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: A detailed breakdown of non-UCC encumbrances, specifically the Ohio tax lien and the Vantage Chemical judgment lien, including outstanding amounts and recording details.
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: An analysis of collateral overlap (e.g., identifying which secured parties have 'all assets' liens vs. 'specific equipment' liens).
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: A clear set of actionable recommendations for closing (e.g., UCC-3 terminations to be filed, payoff letters to be obtained, or subordination agreements required).
COMPLETENESS CRITERION: Reconciliation between the official search certificates (Ohio SOS and Summit County) and the individual filing documents provided to ensure no gaps exist.

The UCC-1 and UCC-3 filings are specific to equipment and do not constitute an 'all assets' blanket lien.

signals.content: What are the exact legal names of all debtor entities involved in the proposed credit facility, and how do they map to the entities found in the lien searches?
Which UCC-1 filings are currently active, lapsed, or amended, and what are their respective filing numbers, filing dates, and lapse dates?
Are there any false positives in the search results (e.g., Buckeye UCC-1 for 'Pinnacle Industrial Services, Inc.') that can be formally excluded from the final report?
What specific collateral is covered by each active UCC-1 filing (e.g., 'all assets' vs. specific equipment, inventory, or accounts receivable)?
Are there any active tax liens or judgment liens filed against any of the debtor entities, and if so, what are the filing dates, recording offices, and outstanding amounts?

What is the relationship between the entities (Pinnacle Industrial Solutions, Inc., Pinnacle Coatings & Surface Technologies LLC, Great Lakes Packaging Co.) as described in the Ridgewater engagement letter?
Are there any subordination, intercreditor, or release agreements indicated in the filings or engagement letter (e.g., involving Ironworks Mezzanine Fund II LP or Allegheny Equipment Finance LLC)?
What is the status of the Tristate Capital Equipment Corp. UCC-1 filing—has it officially lapsed, or is there a risk of continuation?
What are the specific details of the Vantage Chemical Supply Co. judgment lien against Pinnacle Coatings & Surface Technologies LLC (amount, court, date of judgment)?
Who are the secured parties of record for all active filings, and what are their contact details or legal representatives?
In 'allegheny-ucc1-and-amendment.docx': Extract debtor name, secured party name, original filing date/number, amendment details (termination, assignment, or continuation), and collateral description.
In 'buckeye-ucc1-false-positive.docx': Extract debtor name (verify if 'Pinnacle Industrial Services, Inc.'), secured party, filing date, and collateral to confirm false positive status.
In 'crestline-ucc1-and-continuation.docx': Extract original filing date/number, continuation filing date/number, secured party, and collateral description.
In 'ironworks-ucc1.docx': Extract filing date/number, secured party (Ironworks), debtor, and collateral description.

In 'keystone-premium-finance-ucc1.docx': Extract filing date/number, secured party (Keystone Premium Finance Co.), debtor, and collateral description (specifically looking for insurance premium/refund collateral).
In 'midwest-ucc1-great-lakes.docx': Extract debtor (Great Lakes Packaging Co.), secured party, filing date/number, and collateral description.
In 'ohio-sos-search-certificates.docx': Extract search parameters (debtor names searched), search date, and list of certified filings found.
In 'ohio-tax-lien-notice.docx': Extract debtor name, tax lien filing date, recording details (Summit County), tax type, and total lien amount.

In 'ridgewater-engagement-letter-excerpt.docx': Extract transaction parties, structure of the proposed credit facility, definitions of 'Borrower' or 'Guarantors', and references to existing debt/liens.
In 'summit-county-lien-search.docx': Extract search date, scope of search, and details of any real property, fixture, or local tax/judgment liens found for the target entities.
In 'tristate-ucc1-lapsed.docx': Extract original filing date, lapse date, secured party, and confirm lack of continuation filing.
In 'vantage-ucc1-and-judgment-lien.docx': Extract debtor (Pinnacle Coatings), creditor (Vantage Chemical), judgment date, court, amount, and UCC-1 filing details if applicable.
